reasoning: This animation sequence aims to capture the feeling of gently cradling a tangerine.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the care taken with the fruit. The sequence will start with both arms extended slightly forward, palms up, as if ready to receive the tangerine. Then, the arms will move to cradle the imaginary fruit, and finally return to a relaxed position.  Both arms will move in unison.  The wrists will angle slightly to better cup the tangerine, and the movements will be smooth and fluid. This will convey a sense of gentleness and appreciation for the fruit.
